forecasts.reasoning: Based on evidence available up to April 22, 2025: Multiple sources (Yonhap, Prokerala, NewKerala) reported on April 15 that Han Duck-soo will not participate in the PPP presidential primary. However, the question asks about ANY candidacy announcement, not just primary participation. Some PPP members were exploring an alternative path to draft him at a party convention (bypassing the primary), and Han was polling well as a potential candidate. Given Han's official statement declining the primary, the need to announce before May 5 (for May 10-11 registration), and the narrow 13-day window between our knowledge cutoff and the deadline without further announcements, the probability appears low. However, the possibility of a convention draft or independent run isn't fully closed, so I estimate approximately 18% probability.
